message:
fix: reddit protocol loop, fcp-host signal metrics, SDK error context, telemetry span correlation

reddit: fix protocol loop to use should_skip_protocol_line and
parse_error_response like other standardized connectors.

fcp-async-core: add test for compatibility_cx reuse across tasks.

fcp-host: add signal_received_count metric and structured log on each
signal, emit shutdown_reason in the final shutdown log line.

fcp-sdk/migration: add ErrorContext wrapper preserving original error
chain through retry boundaries. Update error_contract and tracing tests.

fcp-telemetry: add SpanCorrelation type linking parent/child span IDs
for distributed trace assembly. Add W3C traceparent generation from
SpanCorrelation. Extend tracing_layer with span correlation extraction
from tracing Span metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
